items.title: Solo Travelling
items.caption: First time travelling alone, whole row to myself!
items.alt: A picture taken from the window seat, looking to the opposite side, showing an empty row of seats.

items.title: Watching On The Plane
items.caption: Doing silly stuff in the air, it's fine because I'm a minor travelling alone.
items.alt: An iPad with a Minecraft video playing on it, placed on the tray table.

items.title: Dinner Night Out
items.caption: Walking to the grand dinner of day zero. The beautiful Shanghai night skyline.
items.alt: A group of Hack Clubbers walking on the street, with a elevated highway on the back with an illuminated underside and a few buildings in the background.

items.title: Hotel
items.alt: A picture of my hotel room, 2 single beds, a TV, the outside sink and the bathroom door.

items.title: Whiteboard Day One
items.caption: The whiteboard drawings of day one. Very fun to look at.

items.title: Out For Lunch
items.caption: Went outside to the mall for lunch. We stole a few looks from the locals with our large group.
items.alt: Walking outside towards a mall. A group of Hack Clubbers in front wearing their Juice jackets.

items.title: First Lunch
items.caption: My first lunch in Shaghai! Vegetarian food I'm pretty sure but that spam-like thing has to have meat, it tastes so real.
items.alt: My first lunch in Shanghai, green beans and a spam-like cutlet served on a bed of rice. Tomato soup on the side and room temperature cucumber drink.

items.title: More Juicing
items.alt: People sitting around the counter with people in the middle operating the juicer.

items.title: Theater
items.caption: There's a small theater at the venue. We watched NeZha.
items.alt: Selfie with the people in the theater.

items.title: Locked In While Locked Out
items.caption: Working on my game while watching the movie.
items.alt: A laptop on the bottom showing my game and a screen in front showing the movie.

source.localPath: Local/Gallery/Photos/Juice 2025/11 - Locked In While Locked Out.jpeg

items.title: Whiteboard Day One Part 2
items.caption: More whiteboard pics! There are even more stuff on the board.
items.alt: A picture of the whiteboard with a variety of drawings and writings. With a large paper attached on the bottom-left containing signatures of various people.

items.title: Hotpot!
items.caption: My first real Hotpot! And it was in China! Very good!
items.alt: Groupfie of me and a few other people around the hotpot table.

items.title: Big Boba
items.caption: I didn't know CoCo sells this big of a boba.
items.alt: A big and regular boba held up against each other, the big boba being a bit shorter but a lot wider than the regular one.

items.title: Boba Night
items.alt: Me and the group holding up our bobas.

items.title: Convenience Store Cat
items.caption: We went to a convenience store near our hotel and saw a cat!
items.alt: A black and white cat on a glass table in a convenience store.

items.title: Hidden Path
items.caption: Went to the venue through a cool hidden walkway, lots of greenery here.
items.alt: A walkway with many greeneries and flowers on the side. In between walls of buildings, possibly homes.

items.title: Flower
items.caption: Assorted pictures of flowers while exploring Shanghai.
items.alt: A pink flower, possibly a Lilac

items.title: Groupfie!
items.caption: Groupfie with Team Tongyu!
items.alt: Me with a group of Hack Clubbers, Team Tongyu!

items.title: Flower 2
items.alt: A viola, also known as a violet, a violet flower.

items.title: Me!
items.caption: A picture of me in Shanghai!
items.alt: Me in front of a plain wall, smiling, wearing my Juice jacket.

items.title: Poster
items.caption: The poster outside our venue, very cool!
items.alt: An easel holding a board with an assortment of posters. Prominent of which is the Juice Poster.

items.title: Six Seven
items.caption: Haha six seven
items.alt: A poster in Chinese promoting the Juice event with the date of April 6-7.

items.title: Robot Coffee
items.caption: This was kinda cool, being in the middle of a park.

items.title: Sundog
items.caption: Cool!

items.title: Me! (3)
items.caption: The tea I have here really tastes like nothing. At least it was cheap.
